name: PALISADE BIO, INC.
summary: . Company Overview We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing next-generation, once-daily, oral phosphodiesterase-4 (PDE4) inhibitor prodrugs designed for targeted delivery to the terminal ileum and colon. Our lead clinical product candidate, PALI-2108, is being developed as a treatment for patients living with inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), including ulcerative colitis (UC) and Crohns disease (CD).
